item.title: API probe URLs in secure/credentials/probes.ts not using defaults.ts constants
item.intent: No hardcoded API URL literals appear in secure/credentials/probes.ts. All probe endpoints derive from constants already defined in config/defaults.ts.
item.description: src/secure/credentials/probes.ts hardcodes three probe API URLs as string literals despite the constants ANTHROPIC_API_BASE, OPENAI_API_BASE, and TELEGRAM_API_BASE already being defined in src/config/defaults.ts (added by BUG-030). Locations: line 76 'https://api.anthropic.com/v1/models', line 125 'https://api.openai.com/v1/models', line 171 'https://api.telegram.org/bot{token}/getMe'. Note: src/evolve/integrate/validate.ts does the same thing (BUG-030 fixed validate.ts) but probes.ts in secure/ was missed — it is a parallel credential probe implementation with identical hardcoding. Steps: (1) import ANTHROPIC_API_BASE, OPENAI_API_BASE, TELEGRAM_API_BASE from ../../config/defaults.js in probes.ts; (2) replace the three literal URL strings with template expressions using the constants; (3) also replace the anthropic-version header literal with ANTHROPIC_API_VERSION from defaults.ts (BUG-043 adds this constant); (4) run secure/ tests. Scope: 1 file, ~6 lines changed. No blocking dependencies if BUG-043 is done first (or run alongside).
